priorities.title: Reactivate Google Ads — All 5 Campaigns Paused
priorities.description: All Google Ads campaigns are currently paused — zero paid traffic entering the funnel. Log into Google Ads, review why campaigns were paused, and re-enable the most relevant ones.
priorities.prompt: Review Google Ads — all 5 campaigns are paused. Re-enable the most relevant ones and check for billing or policy issues.

priorities.title: Send Easter Promo Email Campaign
priorities.description: No campaigns sent in 30 days. Easter segment already built (366 eligible). Easter is April 5 — draft and send promo campaign in Klaviyo targeting PROMO Eligible segment.
priorities.prompt: Write an Easter promotional email for Cuddle Sprouts targeting engaged subscribers. Focus on spring/Easter gifting for babies. Include a promo offer and product highlights. Warm, celebratory, sustainable-brand tone.

priorities.title: Fulfill Order #1455 ($42.54)
priorities.description: Order #1455 (Margarita Moreno, $42.54) came in today and is still unfulfilled. Go to Shopify admin > Orders, find #1455, fulfill and ship.
priorities.prompt: Go to Shopify admin, find order #1455 for Margarita Moreno ($42.54), and fulfill it.

priorities.title: Investigate $0-Revenue Flows
priorities.description: Browse Abandonment (30 deliveries), Winback (22 deliveries), and Abandoned Cart (14 deliveries) all have $0 revenue. Audit triggers, content, and timing to improve conversions.
priorities.prompt: Audit three Klaviyo flows with deliveries but zero revenue: Browse Abandonment, Winback, and Abandoned Cart. Suggest specific fixes for each flow's triggers, content, and timing.

priorities.title: Publish Draft Flows (Back in Stock, Fulfilled Order)
priorities.description: Two Klaviyo flows are still in draft status and not live: Back in Stock Alert and Fulfilled Order. Review and publish them.
priorities.prompt: Review the Back in Stock Alert and Fulfilled Order draft flows in Klaviyo. Suggest improvements before publishing.

emailFlows.name: Welcome Flow
emailFlows.diagnosis: Healthy flow generating $61.20 revenue at $1.07/recipient. 57 deliveries with strong engagement. Email + SMS A/B test active — keep monitoring variant performance.

emailFlows.name: Post-Purchase Bounce Back
emailFlows.diagnosis: Top revenue-per-recipient flow at $1.78. 33 deliveries generating $58.65. Consider adding dynamic product recommendations to the cross-sell email to boost click rate.

emailFlows.name: Browse Abandonment
emailFlows.diagnosis: 30 deliveries but $0 revenue — needs attention. Trigger may fire too broadly (any page view). Narrow to: viewed product page 2+ times OR spent 30+ seconds. Add dynamic product insertion.

emailFlows.name: Winback — High-Value 180 Days
emailFlows.diagnosis: 22 deliveries but $0 revenue. 180-day trigger may be too late — test 60-day trigger. Current incentive may not be compelling enough. Recommend progressive: free shipping → 10% off → 20% off with urgency.

emailFlows.name: Abandoned Cart Reminder
emailFlows.diagnosis: 14 deliveries but $0 revenue despite decent open/click rates. Check if discount codes are working. Email 2 could include social proof. Test bumping discount for high-AOV carts.

emailFlows.name: Sunset Unengaged Subscribers
emailFlows.diagnosis: 8 deliveries — list hygiene flow working as expected. Revenue is $0 by design (sunset goal is re-engagement or clean removal). Monitor unsubscribe rate vs re-engagement rate.
